ogTitle: Skinners Shoot vs Smeaton Grange: Climate Safety

heading: Skinners Shoot vs Smeaton Grange — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Skinners Shoot, New South Wales and Smeaton Grange, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Smeaton Grange has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Skinners Shoot (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Skinners Shoot or Smeaton Grange safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Skinners Shoot has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Smeaton Grange scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Skinners Shoot scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Smeaton Grange scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Skinners Shoot or Smeaton Grange?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Smeaton Grange has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
